failures.description: The agent misread or misreasoned over the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though the tool output showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The tool was invoked correctly and returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer using the higher-priced item, contradicting the relevant tool output. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the wrong answer.
